name: 名刀「將軍木」
icon: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "last_smith:model/sagequoia/model.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "last_smith:model/named/sagequoia/texture.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.last_smith.sagequoia", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]

pages.text: 曾有一振冠以鐵刀之名的木刀，其刃堅韌如鋼。$(br2)而在那「鐵刀木」之上，則是將木竹發揮至極致的名刀「將軍木」$(br2)冠以將軍之名的木刀，雖然未被真正的大將帶到戰場之上，卻早已勝過堅韌如鋼的鐵刀木。
這便是木竹之極致，所有木刀的頂點。
